name: RED Team Fortress 2 mercs
description:

Minus Pyro ofc cause he has the mentality of a toddler and also I have no clue how sex would look like for him through the goggles. Also I don't think he's...mentally and emotionally aware enough to consent

But we have Scout, Soldier, Demoman, Heavy, Engineer, Medic, Sniper and Spy >:)
